titleStmt.title: SII 11.128: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 128. (A.R. No. 451 of 1926.) TĒGŪR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN THE VILLAGE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and refers to his subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gūvaladēva, who possessed the ‘five great sounds’, who was the lord of Banavāsipura and who belonged to the family of Trilōchana-Kadaṁba. While the latter was governing over Koṅkaṇa Nine-Hundred and Halasige Twelve-Thousand, Jayadēva-Gāvuṇḍa granted land for worship, offerings and repairs in the temple of Kalidēvasvāmin.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 7 • • • •, Pushya, śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. In Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 7 (Dundubhi), the Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti fell on Pushya śu. 3 (= Sunday, December 25, A.D. 1082). Śu. 5 is probably a mistake for śu. 3.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha vē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō tta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarēśvaraṁ tṛḷōcanakadaṁbaku
ḷakamaḷamūrttaṇḍaṁ pagemuṭṭegaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭaṁ vairigharaṭṭaṁ mūrttinārāya
ṇaṁ caturapārāyaṇaṁ subhaṭarājaśikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇi ś®manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśva
ra gūvaladēvar koṁkaṇavoṁbaynūṟumaṁ halasige pannircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭani
grahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire svasti ś®cāḷukya
vikramakālada 7 neya saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 5 Ādityavāradaṁdu Uttarā
yaṇasaṁkrāṁti yagaṇyapuṇyatithiyoḷu mārajavāḍināḍa kaṁpaṇaṁ
rajīṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ koḷanūra gāvuṇḍanānvāya meṁteṁdaḍe . vritta .
vinayāṁbhōnidhi satyaśaucaniḷayaṁ ś®mūkagāvuṇḍa nātana putra padarppa caṁ
ḍa nadhikaṁ siṁgaṁ tadīyāgrajaṁ ghanasauryya śvara
padāṁbhōjātabhṛṁgaṁ suhṛjjanacintāmaṇi nirjjitāri negarddaṁ doḷ .
Aṁtenisi negardda siṁgagāvuṇḍana magaṁ jayadēvagāvuṇḍaṁ tamma muttayyaṁ
mūkagāvuṇḍaṁ māḍisida kalidēvasvāmiya dēgulada jīrṇnōddhāra
kkaṁ dēvargge santataṁ tappade gandhadhūpadīpanivēdyakkaṁ naḍeyisuvu
darkke jayadēvagāvuṇḍa nūra mūḍal biṭṭa puṇuse haḍuva lā
ladamaraṁ mēre baḍagalu puṇuseya maraṁ mēreyāgi biṭṭa hāruvagā
ḍa mattar 4 Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ pra
yāge yargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirakavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagamaṁ po
nnalu kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsirvvar brāhmaṇargge Ubha
yamukhiyiṁ koṭṭa phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi
kurukṣētra prayāge yargghyatīrtthadalu sāsirakavileyumā sāsira brā
tapōdhanarumaṁ konda nakku sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu
rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthi
vēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yōha
rīti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi
ha nevēśaṇavondu
Digital edition of SII 11.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
